nasb.text: Now Saul had a concubine whose name was Rizpah, the daughter of Aiah; and Ish-bosheth said to Abner, “Why have you gone in to my father’s concubine?”

esv.text: Now Saul had a concubine whose name was Rizpah, the daughter of Aiah. And Ish-bosheth said to Abner, “Why have you gone in to my father’s concubine?”

cnv.text: 掃羅有一個妃子，名叫利斯巴，是愛亞的女兒。伊施波設對押尼珥說：“你為甚麼親近我父親的妃子呢？”

ccb.text: 他跟扫罗的一个妃嫔、艾押的女儿利斯巴通奸，伊施波设问他：“你为什么跟我父亲的妃嫔一起睡觉呢？”
